/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mobile_llm.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/mobile_llm.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mobile_llm.dir/fast_math.f90.o -o mobile_llm  -Wl,-rpath,/root/venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/torch/lib /root/venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /root/venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/root/venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /root/venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/root/venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed -lgfortran
